goal: Enable all HQ workers to do their best work by providing accurate, concise, and current context about every project
success_criteria: Any worker can explain a project's purpose, architecture, and domain in 30 seconds; context stays current automatically; new workers declare their context needs at creation

features.title: Define project context schema
features.description: Create a standardized schema for project context that captures everything workers need to understand a project
acceptance_criteria: knowledge/project-context/schema.md documents the context structure
Core files defined: context/overview.md, context/architecture.md, context/domain.md
Recommended files defined: context/decisions.md, context/stakeholders.md
Each file has a template with required sections
JSON schema created at knowledge/project-context/context-schema.json for validation
Example context created for one existing project (indigo-nx or distributed-tracking)

features.title: Create context-manager worker
features.description: Create a new worker responsible for discovering, maintaining, and auditing project context
acceptance_criteria: workers/dev-team/context-manager/worker.yaml created with worker definition
Worker added to workers/registry.yaml
Skills defined: discover, audit, update
Each skill has clear inputs, outputs, and verification
Worker type: CodeWorker

features.title: Create worker context needs registry
features.description: Central registry documenting what context each worker type needs to do their best work
acceptance_criteria: knowledge/context-needs/registry.yaml created
Documents context needs for existing worker types
Schema defined for adding new worker needs
knowledge/context-needs/README.md explains how to declare needs

features.title: Add context discovery to /prd command
features.description: After PRD creation, prompt user to populate project context using hybrid discovery
acceptance_criteria: .claude/commands/prd.md updated with new Step 6: Populate Project Context
Step offers three discovery modes: manual, automatic, conversational
Creates projects/{name}/context/ directory with populated files
User can skip context population with warning
If target repo has existing docs, extracts and summarizes into context files

features.title: Add context needs capture to /newworker command
features.description: When creating a new worker, capture what context it needs to do its job
acceptance_criteria: .claude/commands/newworker.md updated with context needs question
Question asks what project context the worker needs
New worker's needs added to knowledge/context-needs/registry.yaml
Worker's worker.yaml includes context_needs field referencing the registry

features.title: Implement repo analysis discovery
features.description: Context-manager skill to automatically extract context from repository structure
acceptance_criteria: discover skill in context-manager can analyze a repo path
Extracts from: README.md, package.json, directory structure, code comments, .env.example
Generates draft context files, asks user to confirm/edit
Works incrementally (can update existing context)

features.title: Implement staleness detection and post-PRD trigger
features.description: Context-manager audits context freshness and runs automatically after PRD completion
acceptance_criteria: Each context file tracks last_updated and last_verified dates in frontmatter
audit skill checks files older than 30 days, missing verification, PRD changes
/run-project triggers context-manager audit skill after PRD completion
Audit produces report: workspace/context-audits/{project}-{date}.md

features.title: Implement conversational discovery
features.description: Context-manager skill to interview users and extract project context from conversation
acceptance_criteria: discover --mode conversational triggers interview flow
Interview batches questions by context section
Extracts structured context from user responses
Allows user to paste existing docs/specs for extraction
Saves conversation summary to context files with source attribution

features.title: Add learnings accumulation
features.description: Workers can append learnings to project context as they work
acceptance_criteria: context/learnings.md added to schema as optional file
Template includes sections: Patterns, Gotchas, Tips, Open Questions
context-manager has learn skill to append insights
Format: ### [Date] [Worker] [Task]: Learning title
Learnings tagged by category for filtering

metadata.purpose: Enable workers to understand projects deeply, not just track tasks
